Comment.value: Called from Import all block templates

Calculation.Text: "This block is already imported in the title. "

Comment.value: When creating new block - only copy values that are not auto-set by relation Lookup

Calculation.Text: List template @ Block template::Number of text fields
List template @ Block template::Number of media containers
List template @ Block template::Number of value fields
List template @ Block template::Value 1 type /*BlockTemplate::CA ValueType OLD*/

Comment.value: Check if BlockTemplate has global texts
NOTE NEED TO ADJUST FOR SECONDARY LANGUAGE TEXTS!
Texts in en-global is the code default id - then take PrimaryKey
If sv-SE or other language then take OriginalKey
